name: englishwithdan-e2e
description: Root-level Playwright E2E test tooling for EnglishWithDan. This package.json exists ONLY to host the E2E toolchain — the actual app lives in backend/, frontend/, and admin-src/, each with its own package.json.

scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:admin
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
